name: Land of Artificial Jellies
short_description: Travel at one second per second through this unusual 'puzzle'-like click'em'up!
detailed_description:
What is this?!


Look, this isn't really a game, and it's definitely not a puzzle game. It's an experience!

Adventure through three Jelly Worlds. Click on Jellies. What more could you want?



The Land of Artificial Jellies is a game-like land about the humble denizens of Jellytopia. Adventure through three hand-crafted Gelatinous Worlds to claim your prize (there is not really a prize).

This game invokes puzzle elements (while not being a puzzle game), casual gaming, and avant-garde storytelling through the arcane communications of your Jelly Subjects.

You'll never be bored in the Land of Artificial Jellies. That is, until you complete the game (in about an hour), and then you'll be bored for the rest of your life.

Please take your time.
